name: Chocolate Frosting - Sugar Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine skim milk, vanilla, and Dream Whip in a bowl.
2. Mix until combined.
3. Beat the mixture until stiff peaks form.
4. Add sugarfree chocolate pudding mix to the whipped cream.
5. Continue beating until light and fluffy.
6. If the frosting is too thick, add more skim milk until desired consistency is reached.
7. Frost low-fat cupcakes with 1 tablespoon per cupcake.
8. This frosting can also be used to frost cakes or brownies.
9. Note: 1 tablespoon of this frosting contains 9 calories and 0 cholesterol.
